title: Glorii Profus
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Glorii Profus |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Silver]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It is the proudest duty of a trooper to serve and seek a good death.|Glorii Profus|}} '''Glorii Profus''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]–affiliated [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] who served as a [[mentop]]—a part [[Psychiatrist|psychiatric]], part spiritual adviser—to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. Profus gave a ritualistic speech to the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] who departed to fight in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. ==Biography== Glorii Profus was a [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] loyal to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who participated in the training of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], which comprised [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] from [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett's]] [[DNA/Legends|DNA]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. Profus served as a [[mentop]]—a combination of a [[Psychiatrist|psychiatric]] and spiritual advisor—to many [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], including [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Jangotat|Alpha-98's]] [[cohort]]. Profus taught the clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] not to be afraid of [[Death/Legends|death]], and he gave a ritualistic speech to troopers who departed to fight in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], while he toasted them with a cup of the finest [[Tallian wine]] in the quadrant. His words comforted numerous clones before they marched to battle, and Alpha-98 fondly remembered Profus' teachings. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|From water you are born. In fire you die. Your bodies seed the stars.''"
"''We seed the stars!|Profus and the clone troopers, reciting the ritual words|}} Profus was a [[Color/Legends|silver]]-skinned Kaminoan with a long and gracefully arched neck. His voice was cultured and comforting as he gave his speech to the clone troopers, saying that their bodies would seed the [[Star/Legends|stars]] after their deaths. Profus taught the troopers that their proudest duty was to serve the Republic and die a good death. ==Behind the scenes== Glorii Profus was briefly mentioned in ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'', a [[2004]] novel by [[Steven Barnes]]. In [[2008]], Profus received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. Profus's entry addressed him as "mentor," instead of ''The Cestus Deception''{{'s}} spelling of "mentop."{{CSWECite|III|46|Profus, Glorii}} However, ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' also included an entry for "mentop."{{CSWECite|II|306|Mentop}} ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Glorii Profus }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Profus, Glorii}} [[Category:Healers and doctors]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Kaminoans]] [[Category:Religious workers]]
